calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Aug-26-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Plaintiffs: Linda Colfax and Kristin Lamoureux, are present in pro per, no appearance by Plaintiff: Stephanie Scott.
Parties were sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in foavor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendant: Mike Ghazan as follows:
Damages $75,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $26,250.00
Costs $1,449.50, for a total of $102,699.50
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Aug. 26, 2004
Judgment signed by Judge Ollie Marie Victoire
